query:
SELECT
            key_id,
            name,
            grace_period_ends_at,
            rotation_reason,
            created_at
        FROM api_keys
        WHERE user_id = $1
          AND grace_period_ends_at IS NOT NULL
          AND grace_period_ends_at > NOW()
          AND is_active = true
          AND revoked_at IS NULL
        ORDER BY grace_period_ends_at ASC
